# Test fixtures generated by simple-datagen.py must be byte-stable across
# contributors and across reruns; both pyarrow (writes the file) and thriftpy2
# (rewrites the footer for annotations PyArrow can't emit) directly produce
# bytes that end up checked into git, so their versions are pinned exactly.
# Requires Python >=3.10, <3.15 (PyArrow 24.0.0 supports 3.10-3.14).
numpy>=2.4.1
pyarrow==24.0.0
asciinema
thriftpy2==0.6.0
